attempts.reflection: You repeatedly tried to craft an iron pickaxe without first obtaining enough iron ingots. Specifically, you needed 3 iron ingots to craft an iron pickaxe, but you only had 1-2 at any given time. Additionally, you missed smelting the second iron ore into an iron ingot, which would have provided the necessary materials. Ensure you fully complete each crafting step before moving on to the next one. For example, smelt both iron ores into iron ingots before attempting to craft the iron pickaxe.

attempts.reflection: You need to prioritize obtaining a stone pickaxe before attempting to mine iron ore or cobblestone. Specifically, after mining oak logs and crafting sticks, use those resources to craft a wooden pickaxe. Then, craft a stone pickaxe using the wooden pickaxe and some cobblestone. This will allow you to mine iron ore and cobblestone effectively. Additionally, ensure you smelt iron ore into iron ingots using a furnace before attempting to craft a chest.
